steps.title: Read the graph for x-axis crossings
steps.content: $f(x)=0$ wherever the graph of $y=f(x)$ crosses the $x$-axis. From the form $f(x)=abx+c$ (a linear function in $x$), the curve is a straight line. Inspect the graph to count crossings.

steps.title: Match the count
steps.content:
The line shown does not intersect the $x$-axis at all (it stays entirely above or entirely below it). So $f(x)=0$ has zero solutions.

D is correct.
